title: Palo Alto Networks security advisory (AV26-583)
description: On June 10, 2026, Palo Alto Networks published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Cortex XSIAM CommvaultSecurityIQ Marketplace 1.1.0  versions prior to 1.2.0
Cortex XSOAR CommvaultSecurityIQ Marketplace 1.1.0  versions prior to 1.2.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
